earlyMorning: What a refreshing morning. Let's take it one step at a time today.
The early bird catches the worm. You're off to a great start.
In the morning stillness, take a moment to set your goals for today.
A new morning has begun. May today be a little better than yesterday.
Breathe in the morning air and recharge your energy.
Today will never come again. Make the most of it.
Starting the day means finding small joys along the way.
With the dawn come new opportunities.
The early morning quiet brings the energy you need for today.
Today is like fresh snow — no footprints yet. Make it your own.
Just as the sun rises, so do your possibilities.
Like morning coffee, may today be warm and fulfilling.
Waking up itself is a miracle. Begin today with gratitude.
Every morning is a new page. What story will you write?
The crisp morning air clears your mind for the day ahead.
Decide on one goal for today, and the rest will follow.
The morning is full of potential. Give it everything you've got.
Begin today with a heart as clear as morning dew.
Each small step today connects to the great path ahead.
The morning light is opening a brand new day for you.
morning: Morning is peak focus time. Make the most of it now.
How's the first half of your day going?
Approach each task with care and attention.
Getting the important things done in the morning makes the afternoon easier.
Your efforts today are making a difference for someone.
Small consistent steps lead to big results over time.
You've grown a little more since yesterday — believe it.
Drink some water and refresh your mind.
It's okay to go at your own pace today.
The hardest challenges are where you grow the most.
Today's effort will definitely help the future you.
A short break creates the next wave of focus.
Your smile is brightening someone's day right now.
Start with what you can do. That's what matters most.
Today's learning becomes tomorrow's confidence.
Getting started is more important than being perfect.
A quiet moment with tea helps settle the mind.
It's okay if things don't go as planned. Stay flexible.
Remember you have teammates working alongside you today.
Welcome yourself to today with a warm "glad you're here."
afternoon: Let's keep the energy going into the afternoon.
Did you have lunch? Make sure to fuel up properly.
Feeling a little sleepy? Stretch out and reset.
Shine like the afternoon sun and keep going strong.
Keep being yourself in the second half of today.
Give yourself a small pat on the back for how far you've come.
Half the day is done. Let's make the second half count.
Afternoons are great for fresh ideas to surface.
Take a breath and revisit your goal for today.
If you're feeling tired, try a short walk outside.
Your morning effort is fueling your afternoon momentum.
A coffee break can recharge your afternoon energy.
Your work today is leading to someone's smile.
Steady and sure. Take good care of what's left of today.
Look out the window — the world outside is waiting for you.
Time to focus for the afternoon. One more push.
Do you have a clear picture of what needs to be done today?
Moving your body also refreshes your mind.
You're making steady progress today. Keep the faith.
In the afternoon light, things can look fresh and new.
evening: Good work today. You've earned your rest.
As the sun sets, reflect on what you accomplished today.
Find one thing to be grateful for at the end of the day.
Enjoy dinner and recharge for tomorrow.
Give yourself a round of applause for today's effort.
Breathe slowly and let go of today's tension.
Even small wins are worth writing down today.
Today's setbacks become tomorrow's wisdom.
Let work go and enjoy your own time tonight.
Close today's chapter with the warmth of a sunset.
Share your gratitude with someone you met today.
At day's end, set aside one small thing to look forward to tomorrow.
You've definitely grown more than yesterday — it's true.
The quiet of dusk helps settle your heart.
Release today's fatigue before it carries over to tomorrow.
Time with people you care about fuels tomorrow's energy.
Looking back on today — what was the best moment?
Night is your time to step away from the noise and come back to yourself.
Today, you were important to someone, even if you didn't know it.
Let the evening breeze carry away today's weariness.
night: Get plenty of sleep tonight — it's a gift to tomorrow's you.
Under the starry sky, gently close the book on today.
Rest well, and let's meet again tomorrow full of energy.
In tonight's stillness, let your mind come to peace.
Rest early so tomorrow's you can wake up smiling.
You did a wonderful job today. Truly.
A good book tonight enriches tomorrow's thinking.
Listen to your favorite music and let yourself unwind tonight.
Tomorrow is another brand new day — look forward to it.
Take a deep breath and recall the good moments from today.
Tonight's quiet is nurturing tomorrow's ideas.
Count three things you're grateful for today.
A little preparation tonight makes tomorrow morning easier.
Looking up at the night sky makes your worries feel smaller.
A long soak in the bath helps untangle body and mind.
Tonight's dream might become tomorrow's inspiration.
To those still working late — don't push too hard.
Be grateful for something new you encountered today.
Sleep well tonight so you can wake up refreshed tomorrow.
You truly did great today. Goodnight.

referenceHint.timelinePost: Enter the trailing numeric ID from a timeline post URL (e.g. /timeline/posts/123).
referenceHint.bulletinThread: Enter the trailing numeric ID from a bulletin thread URL (e.g. /bulletin/threads/456).
referenceHint.blogPost: Enter the trailing numeric ID from a blog post URL (e.g. /blog/posts/789).
referenceHint.chatMessage: Use the message action menu "Copy message ID" to obtain the numeric ID, then paste it here.
referenceHint.file: Enter the trailing numeric ID from a file detail URL (e.g. /files/321).
referenceHint.team: Enter the numeric ID from a team detail URL (e.g. /teams/12).
referenceHint.organization: Enter the numeric ID from an organization detail URL (e.g. /organizations/3).
referenceHint.event: Enter the numeric ID from an event detail URL (e.g. /events/77).
referenceHint.document: Enter the numeric ID from a document detail URL (e.g. /documents/55).
referenceHint.url: To create a URL card, change the card type above to URL.
